next_steps: Perform BRAF V600E mutation testing on the tibial biopsy specimen
Evaluate for systemic involvement including cardiovascular (cardiac MRI), neurological, and pulmonary assessment
Initiate treatment with an interferon-alpha or a BRAF inhibitor if mutation is positive
Obtain serum and urine protein electrophoresis with immunofixation to rule out evolving plasma cell dyscrasia
Continue clinical monitoring for systemic progression or organ-specific dysfunction
